results.title: Navigating the Safety Landscape: Measuring Risks in Finetuning Large Language Models
results.snippet: Safety basin where random perturbations to model weights maintain safety within local neighborhood; outside this region safety is fully compromised with sharp drop, contrasting with capability landscape where performance peaks at origin and gradually declines.
